title: Crystal & Combat Pack
description: C&C Pack is a lightweight, performance-optimized Minecraft PvP modpack designed for fast-paced combat. With clean visuals, boosted FPS, and optimized settings, it delivers a smooth and competitive PvP experience perfect for duels, crystal fights, and more
body: C&C Pack is a lightweight, performance-optimized Minecraft PvP modpack designed for fast-paced combat. With clean visuals, boosted FPS, and optimized settings, it delivers a smooth and competitive PvP experience – perfect for duels, crystal fights, and arena battles.
